Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze the given POWL model identify anomalies hypothesize why they exist and propose database queries to verify them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model has a loop E P meaning evaluate then optionally approve and loop back to evaluate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Actually loop in process tree LOOP with children E P means execute E then either exit or execute P then loop back to E

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That means evaluation can happen multiple times and approval can happen multiple times but they are in order always E before each possible P

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: However the model also introduces partial order anomalies R to A A to loop loop to xor and also A to C directly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So C can happen after A without waiting for loop or xor

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: That means closing can happen prematurely

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Also xor allows skip of N notification

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So anomalies premature closure skipping notification repeated evaluation approval cycles

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Hypotheses business rule changes miscommunication technical errors inadequate constraints

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Queries use claim_events table to find claims where close activity occurs before evaluate or approve or where multiple approves or where no notification event
